zkWrite the C source code.  It is produced in 'self.sourcefilename',
        which can be tweaked beforehand.Nz

_write_source
filer
write_sourceI
Verifier.write_sourcec
Write the C source code (if not done already) and compile it.
        This produces a dynamic link library in 'self.modulefilename'.z
module already compiledN)
_compile_module
compile_moduleR
Verifier.compile_modulec
Get a C module from this Verifier instance.
        Returns an instance of a FFILibrary class that behaves like the
        objects returned by ffi.dlopen(), but that delegates all
        operations to the C module.  If necessary, the C code is written
        and compiled first.
        N)
